description_long: This rifle features a long, rectangular black receiver with a prominent cylindrical drum magazine mounted beneath the center. The barrel is metallic and extends forward from the receiver, with a simple, unadorned muzzle. The grip is angled and black, positioned just behind the drum magazine for ergonomic handling. There is a metallic carrying handle or sight rail on top of the receiver, but no visible optical or iron sights are attached. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal external detailing and a focus on function over aesthetics.
description: A black, rectangular rifle with a metallic barrel and a large drum magazine beneath the receiver. The design is simple and utilitarian, with a prominent grip and minimal external features.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, the drum magazine, and the metallic barrel extending forward.
description_view_1: Angled top-rear view highlighting the drum magazine and the metallic handle or rail on top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the grip, drum magazine, and the full length of the receiver and barrel.
description_view_3: Angled top-front view focusing on the barrel opening and the drum magazine's circular profile.
